title: System Settings Overview
drDigitalIntro:
Settings is where you customize how your computer works.
• Open the Settings app from the dock.
• Change things like brightness, dark mode, text size, and notifications.
• Think of it like your home — set it up the way you like.

playgroundTask.goal: You explored Settings and turned on Dark Mode

steps.say: Turn on Dark Mode — watch the whole screen change!

drDigitalSuccess: Dark Mode on! Notice how the menu bar, dock, and background all changed. You can always come back to Settings and switch it off.
drDigitalHint: Click Appearance in the left sidebar, then flip the Dark Mode toggle.
